metadata.description: KyaniteHQ's agent harness: reusable Claude Code / Codex skills, generic implementer/reviewer agent templates, and shared orchestration contracts.

plugins.name: babysit-pr
plugins.description: Shepherd a slice's squash-merge PR to `main` end-to-end: pre-PR quality loop, open with a reviewer-ready description, poll CI gates, delegate the Greptile loop to greploop, fix findings, and squash-merge only when green.

plugins.name: greploop
plugins.description: Iteratively drive a PR to a clean Greptile review (5/5, zero unresolved comments): re-review, fix every actionable finding, reply, resolve threads, push, repeat (max 5 rounds). Adapted from greptileai/skills (MIT).

plugins.name: check-pr
plugins.description: One-shot triage of a GitHub PR: unresolved review comments, failing checks, and an incomplete description; categorize each issue and optionally fix, push, and resolve threads. Adapted from greptileai/skills (MIT).

plugins.name: greptile-cli
plugins.description: Run and manage local Greptile reviews from the terminal with the `greptile` CLI — review a branch before opening a PR, plus login/settings/update.

plugins.name: pr-review-canvas
plugins.description: Render an interactive HTML PR-review walkthrough for any GitHub repo: categorizes core vs mechanical changes, adds reviewer annotations, and renders diffs with moved-code detection.

plugins.name: adversarial-plan-bounce
plugins.description: Adversarially grade a plan file with Codex as a second model (0-100, structural blockers, held decisions). v1 = one scoring round; v2 loops bounce -> maximize -> re-bounce until the plan converges.

plugins.name: metric-gated-refactor
plugins.description: Metric-gated refactoring loop for Python: requires a measured signal (radon CC + grimp/Louvain) AND a named semantic problem before any change, then generates a ready-to-run /goal prompt. Python only.

plugins.name: to-slices
plugins.description: Decompose a plan/PRD/feature into a VALIDATED DAG of vertically-sliced issues (touch-set, acceptance criteria, blocked-by, layer-rank) behind a fail-loud Kahn + antichain + layer-rank gate. Orchestration bundle: use via full-repo clone (depends on orchestration/ + agents/).

plugins.name: slice-conductor
plugins.description: Execute a validated slice DAG end-to-end as an agent-team lead: worktree per slice, persistent implementer + reviewer, implement -> review -> fix to PASS, integration-branch merge, then one babysit-pr ship. Orchestration bundle: use via full-repo clone (depends on orchestration/ + agents/).

plugins.name: inspect-site
plugins.description: Live-site reconnaissance via chrome-devtools MCP: drive a real attached browser to observe endpoints, request/response shapes, DOM, and console — every claim tagged with a truth level (structural / engine-observed / production-validated).

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: Generate or edit images via ChatGPT's image_generation tool (gpt-image-2), authenticating with Codex/ChatGPT OAuth tokens — no API key, just an active Codex login.

plugins.name: modern-seo
plugins.description: Primary-source SEO and agentic-web guidance grounded in Google's AI optimization guide and Chrome's agentic-browsing docs. Covers the two-surface model: ranking in Google Search/AI features, and being usable by AI agents (WebMCP, Lighthouse agentic-browsing, UCP).

plugins.name: gbp-optimize
plugins.description: Google Business Profile (GBP / Google My Business) optimization for Google Maps & local-pack ranking and AI-search visibility — audit, categories, reviews, citations, suspensions, local schema, and a deep Turkey playbook. Primary-source-grounded; fully global.
